alert.title: Your informations are incomplete.
alert.message: We need you to fill all you details to allow you into an eAuction.
alert.registerText: and register your company and personnal informations.

empty.title: No eAuctions available
empty.message: Currently, there are no auctions created. Once the auction owner sets up new eAuctions, it will appear here.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Auction
deleteDialog.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the selected auctions?
deleteDialog.warningMessage: eAuctions will no longer appear in the list of auctions
deleteDialog.irreversibleWarning: This action is irreversible and all associated data will be permanently removed.

duplication.title: Duplicate Auction
duplication.simple: Simple duplication of the current eAuction settings
duplication.training: Duplicate the eAuction for all suppliers in case of training
